Objective: MỞ RỘNG QUỐC GIA MỚI — VCreator Global

Tổng quan: Báo giá cho MỖI LẦN thêm 1 quốc gia mới vào VCreator Global Platform. Platform đã có đầy đủ features — thêm country = Configuration + Content + Compliance + Ops + QA. KHÔNG bao gồm phát triển features mới.

Mô tả: Nghiên cứu thuế TNCN/withholding tax per country. Tax bands, rates, withholding rules, reporting requirements.
Note:
- Nghiên cứu tax law per country
- Xác định: tax rate, bands, withholding rules
- Annual reporting requirements
- So sánh vs countries hiện có (VN, PH)
- Output: tax config document cho dev setup

Mô tả: Xác định danh sách ID types accepted, validation rules, document format requirements per country.
Note:
- Danh sách Government ID types accepted
- Validation rules per ID type (format, expiry)
- Document upload requirements (resolution, file size)
- VD: Indonesia = KTP, SIM, Passport
- Output: KYC config document

Mô tả: Đánh giá privacy laws per country: data residency, consent, retention, deletion rights.
Note:
- Privacy law assessment (GDPR-like, local laws)
- Data residency requirements
- Consent requirements
- Data retention / deletion policies
- Output: privacy compliance checklist

Mô tả: Soạn T&C, Contract, Privacy Policy per country per language. Review bởi luật sư local.
Note:
- Draft T&C per country per language
- Draft Contract template per country
- Draft Privacy Policy per country
- Legal review bởi luật sư local (external)
- Finalize + approve
- CRITICAL PATH: lead time 2-4 tuần

Mô tả: Giấy phép kinh doanh, compliance requirements cho nền tảng tại country mới.
Note:
- Business license requirements per country
- Platform operation permits
- Financial service regulations (nếu applicable)
- Data processing agreements
- Output: compliance readiness report

Mô tả: Tạo country config trong Country Config Service: code, name, currency, languages, timezone.
Note:
- Tạo record country config
- Currency: code, symbol, position, decimal
- Languages: local + English
- Timezone, date format, number format
- Enable country: active = true
- Test: country xuất hiện trong country selector

Mô tả: Config currency per country. Tìm exchange rate API source. Setup integration + cache.
Note:
- Research exchange rate API per country (central bank / financial API)
- Setup API integration + Redis cache
- Config TTL, fallback rules
- Test: realtime rate hiển thị đúng
- Test: fallback khi API fail

Mô tả: Nhập tax rules, rates, withholding config vào Tax Calculation Engine. Test calculations.
Note:
- Nhập tax rules từ Legal Research output
- Config: rate, bands, withholding type
- Test: Gross → Tax → Net calculation
- Test: edge cases (zero earnings, max tier)
- Test: annual tax summary generation

Mô tả: Config accepted ID types, validation rules, upload requirements per country.
Note:
- Nhập accepted ID types từ KYC Research output
- Config validation rules per ID type
- Config upload requirements (format, size)
- Test: KYC form hiển thị đúng ID types
- Test: validation rules hoạt động

Mô tả: Nhập danh sách banks, e-wallets. Setup payment gateway integration per country.
Note:
- Research: banks list per country
- Nhập bank/e-wallet list + validation format per bank
- Setup payment gateway credentials (sandbox + production)
- Config: payment methods allowed per country
- Test: sandbox payment end-to-end

Mô tả: Config OAuth providers enabled, social platforms allowed per country.
Note:
- Config OAuth providers (TikTok, Google, Facebook — shared credentials)
- Config social platforms per country (TikTok, FB, IG, Threads, YouTube)
- Config content URL validation per platform
- Test: OAuth login flow cho country mới
- Test: content URL validation

Mô tả: Enable/disable features per country. Deferred KYC, Facebook login, payment methods, etc.
Note:
- Review feature flags checklist
- Config per country: enable/disable per feature
- VD: gcash_payment = true (PH only), deferred_kyc = true
- Test: feature visibility per country
- Audit log verify

Mô tả: Setup payment gateway keys, exchange rate API keys, encryption per country.
Note:
- Generate / receive API keys per country
- Store in secrets management (encrypted)
- Payment gateway: sandbox + production keys
- Exchange rate API: keys per country
- Test: keys work in sandbox

Mô tả: Config country-level metrics, alerting thresholds, health dashboard.
Note:
- Add country tag trong Elastic APM
- Config alerting thresholds per country
- Add country to monitoring dashboard
- Test: metrics flowing correctly
- Test: alert triggers

Mô tả: Dịch tất cả locale files (errors, notifications, labels) sang local language.
Note:
- Dịch: errors.json, notifications.json, labels.json
- Review bởi native speaker
- Test: tất cả error/notification messages hiển thị đúng ngôn ngữ
- Fallback test: thiếu key → English

Mô tả: Dịch toàn bộ UI labels, buttons, tooltips, messages sang local language.
Note:
- Dịch frontend locale files
- Review bởi native speaker
- Test: toàn bộ screens hiển thị đúng
- Test: number/currency/date format per locale
- Test: language switcher hoạt động

Mô tả: Nhập T&C, contract, privacy policy per language vào CMS. Preview + publish.
Note:
- Nhập nội dung legal đã approved (từ task 4)
- Per language: local + English
- Preview per language trước publish
- Test: Creator thấy đúng T&C khi đăng ký
- Test: Contract ký + download PDF

Mô tả: Tạo notification + email templates bằng local language per event type.
Note:
- Tạo templates: welcome, campaign, payment, KYC status
- Per language: local + English
- Variables: {creator_name}, {amount}, etc.
- Test send mỗi template
- Preview + approve

Mô tả: Localized landing page: copy, hero text, testimonials, stats, images.
Note:
- Draft landing page copy per language
- Localized images/assets
- Testimonials từ local creators (hoặc placeholder)
- Stats: số creator, brands, payout
- Design review + publish

Mô tả: Tạo sample campaign templates, content guidelines cho local market.
Note:
- Campaign templates per category (beauty, tech, food...)
- Content guidelines per platform per country
- Sample campaign cho onboarding
- Đa ngôn ngữ

Mô tả: Tạo training guides, SOP, FAQ cho local ops team bằng local language.
Note:
- Admin Panel guide (local language)
- Content Moderation SOP
- KYC Review SOP
- Reconciliation & Payment SOP
- FAQ cho common operations

Mô tả: Tuyển/assign Local Admin, Ops, Finance team cho country mới.
Note:
- Xác định headcount per role
- Recruit hoặc assign từ existing team
- Interview + onboard
- NDA + access agreements

Mô tả: Tạo admin accounts, assign roles, verify permissions cho local team.
Note:
- Tạo accounts: Local Admin, Ops, Finance
- Assign roles via RBAC system
- Verify: mỗi role chỉ thấy data country mình
- Verify: permission matrix đúng
- Welcome email + first login guide

Mô tả: Training sessions với local team: Admin Panel, Content Moderation, KYC, Reconciliation, Payout.
Note:
- Training session 1: Platform overview + Admin basics
- Training session 2: Content Moderation + KYC Review
- Training session 3: Reconciliation + Payment
- Q&A sessions
- Hands-on practice trên staging

Mô tả: Test payment end-to-end trong sandbox per country: bank transfer, e-wallet.
Note:
- Test sandbox: bank transfer flow
- Test sandbox: e-wallet flow (nếu có)
- Test: success + failure scenarios
- Test: webhook callbacks
- Test: retry logic
- Sign-off: ready cho production

Mô tả: Test reconciliation workflow: create batch, lock rate, approve, execute payment.
Note:
- Test: tạo reconciliation batch cho country mới
- Test: rate locking (accept + manual)
- Test: approve batch
- Test: execute payment
- Test: failed payment handling
- Test: financial reports per country

Mô tả: Test toàn bộ Creator flows: signup → KYC → campaign join → content submit → earnings → payout.
Note:
- Creator: OAuth login → country selection → KYC → campaign → content → earnings → withdrawal
- Admin: content moderation → KYC review → campaign management
- Finance: reconciliation → payment → reporting
- Brand Portal: campaign create → content monitor → analytics
- Cross-browser + mobile responsive

Mô tả: Test data isolation: country mới KHÔNG thấy data countries khác và ngược lại.
Note:
- Test: Creator country A không thấy campaigns country B
- Test: Ops country A không thấy content country B
- Test: Finance country A không thấy earnings country B
- Test: API rejection cho cross-country requests
- Test: URL path injection prevention
- MANDATORY — không skip được

Mô tả: UAT với local team → soft launch (limited) → monitor → full go-live.
Note:
- UAT: local team test all flows trên production
- Soft launch: invite limited creators (50-100)
- Monitor: errors, latency, data integrity
- Fix critical issues
- Full go-live: enable country cho public
- Post-launch monitoring (72h)

Task: Tax, KYC, Privacy, Legal Review, Business Compliance
Country Config, Currency, Tax, KYC, Banks, OAuth, Feature Flags, Secrets, Monitoring
UI Translation, T&C, Notifications, Landing Page, Campaign Templates, Training Docs
E2E Test, Data Isolation, UAT, Soft Launch, Go-Live

Objective: 1. Estimate này là cho MỖI LẦN thêm 1 quốc gia mới (sau khi platform đã build xong).
2. KHÔNG bao gồm phát triển features mới — chỉ Configuration + Content + Compliance + Ops + QA.
3. BA + PM chiếm ~37% effort vì chủ yếu là research, legal, content, training — không phải coding.
4. QC chiếm ~21% vì E2E testing + data isolation verification cho mỗi country là mandatory.
5. Timeline target: 4 tuần (parallel execution). Critical path: Legal Review (2-4 tuần lead time).
6. Nếu country có payment ecosystem phức tạp (nhiều e-wallets, bank variants) → +20-40h cho Payment.
7. Nếu country có ngôn ngữ khó (CJK, Arabic RTL) → +40-60h cho i18n/FE.
8. Country thứ 3+ sẽ nhanh hơn nhờ experience + templates từ countries trước (~70-80% estimate).
